name: DeXJs
description: The most XJ-dedicated channel on YouTube. Dex owns over 1,000 Jeep Cherokees and has saved hundreds from the scrapyard. Deep-dive repairs and real-world XJ knowledge.

name: NickInTimeFilms
description: Every repair and fix documented on a single 1989 Cherokee. One of the most thorough XJ-specific libraries on YouTube.

name: OutJeeping
description: In-depth XJ Cherokee how-to repair videos and off-road adventures. Step-by-step walkthroughs for the most common XJ fixes.

name: D&E In The Garage
description: General Jeep and automotive repair channel with strong XJ and WJ content. Known for clear diagnostics and junkyard finds.

name: BleepinJeep
description: Popular off-road and Jeep DIY channel covering builds, repairs, and adventures across multiple platforms. Good for general Jeep knowledge.
